programmes.show_description: The Rotters: Tara and Steed investigate when members of the Institute of Timber Technology are killed. Will The Avengers locate the killers before they have the chance to execute their plan?
Smilin' Jack: A helicopter pilot wants to get back to fighting despite his failing health while a soldier who received two Purple Hearts is tired of the bloodbath and wishes to be sent home.
The More I See You: A woman Hawkeye used to live with is assigned to the 4077th. Hawkeye admits it's not possible to simply work with her and they begin a passionate affair.
Deluge: Just as everyone is ready to relax the PA announces incoming wounded. The Chinese Army joins the war, killing any hopes the 4077th has about a speedy resolution and homecoming.
Plastic Dreamworld: Matthew goes on a spending spree after inheriting a large sum of money from his grandfather.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
One Fresh Batch Of Lemonade: Part 2: Jonathan sets out to restore Deke's faith in himself with the help of a young gymnast.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
A Divine Madness: Mr Crook, convinced he is King Arthur, is in danger of being declared incompetent by his son. Can Jonathan work a reconciliation?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

The Inner Limits: A young man learns that the brother he once considered institutionalised has a brilliant mind within a paralysed body.
It's A Dog's Life: Thinking Jonathan has turned into a dog, Mark embarks alone to unite a young runaway with his family.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: Haunted House: Although many in Walnut Grove think he's a crazy man who lives in a haunted house, Laura befriends a mysterious hermit and soon unearths the truth behind his reclusive life.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: The Spring Dance: Caroline is puzzled when her plan to make Isaiah Edwards jealous fails.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: Remember Me: Part 1: Widow Julia Sanderson is unafraid when Doc Baker diagnoses her with a terminal illness, but she knows she must help her three children cope with the news. Part 1 of 2.
The Long Night: With Grandma in the hospital, Grandpa feels alone and unneeded. But will an unlikely, blossoming friendship be enough to lift his spirits?
The Hiding Place: The Baldwins' niece Hilary arrives on Walton's Mountain, seeking a hiding place from the horrors of war breaking out in her native Austria.
The Final Frontier: There are some strange goings-on in the stratosphere over Ballykissangel. Niamh faces her feelings for Sean.
And Is There Honey Still for Tea?: Tom advertises for a replacement doctor; Linda and Len face a challenging time with their new foster child.
When Lady Cora's pregnant maid is rushed to the Thrift with labour pains, no one suspects she will lead them into the criminal underworld and bring Eleanor's father back to surgery.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Rumpole and the Fascist Beast: Rumpole defends a retired army Captain who faces serious charges under the Race Relations Act. Meanwhile, Rumpole mentors a new pupil.
The Interview: The men are asked by interviewer Clete Roberts about their feelings on the war and its effects on them, and their futures for a documentary.
Bug Out - Part 1: When a rumour for a camp relocation turns out to be real, Hawkeye, Margaret and Radar volunteer to stay behind for a patient who cannot be moved.
Bug Out - Part 2: Hawkeye, Margaret 'Hot Lips' and Radar quickly learn after the unit departs that they're in the midst of the battlefront.
...the Likely Lads?: The Old Magic: Terry is disappointed that Bob has asked someone else to be his best man at the wedding but eventually agrees to go out for a meal with his friend.
...the Likely Lads?: Countdown: Mrs Chambers has grandiose plans for Thelma's wedding to Bob that leave the men feeling overwhelmed, so they decide to rebel.
...Likely Lads?: Boys' Night In: Terry is horrified when Bob refuses to go on a stag night and insists on a quiet night in instead.
Trap: Steed and the team find themselves in danger as a prolific criminal looks to exact their revenge on them.
The Interrogators: Steed and Tara investigate when national security is compromised by a foreign agent who has devised ingenious methods of extracting top secret information.
The Interview: The men are asked by interviewer Clete Roberts about their feelings on the war and its effects on them, and their futures for a documentary.

Bug Out - Part 2: Hawkeye, Margaret 'Hot Lips' and Radar quickly learn after the unit departs that they're in the midst of the battlefront.
Acting out: Matthew decides he wants to become an actor, but Henry is concerned his son will make a fool of himself during a college production.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Catch A Falling Star: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Help Wanted: Angel: An advertisement brings Jonathan and Mark to an elderly scriptwriter who needs an 'angel' to help bankroll his movie about the lonely people in his neighbourhood.

Part 1: Jonathan Smith, an angel, has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at Havencrest retirement home and the administrator Leslie Gordon.
Part 2: Jonathan is forced to reveal his real identity to Leslie's brother, Mark, in order to successfully complete his first assignment at Havencrest retirement home.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: Remember Me: Part 2: When it appears that no family can adopt all three of the Sanderson children together, a weary Charles fears he must break his promise to their mother. Part 2 of 2.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: The Camp Out: Despite a rocky start, the Olesons accompany the Ingalls on a family camping trip, and surprisingly, the feuding families enjoy each other's company.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: At the End of the Rainbow: Laura swears her friend Jonah to secrecy after the two uncover what appears to be gold ore lying on the bed of their favourite fishing hole.
The Go-Getter: Ben's tactics for selling used cars alienates both family and friends.
The Achievement: John-Boy travels to New York in pursuit of his dreams.
Two Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest: Has Quigley got what it takes to save the village's reputation, and will Orla be rescued from the runaway hot air balloon?
More Than You Know: An emergency parish meeting is called to stop the road being built. Donald faces an ethical dilemma, and are Rev. Brewer's and Mr Boynton's suspicions proved correct?
Eleanor is flattered by the attentions of Dr Samuel Hunter but must revise her opinion of him when Mary, his housekeeper, suddenly dies and dark, buried secrets resurface.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Rumpole and the Course of True Love: Rumpole takes on a case where a teacher is accused of seducing a student.
Margaret's Engagement: Margaret's sudden engagement comes as a surprise to everyone, but Frank predictably takes it the hardest.
Out of Sight: Hawkeye is temporarily blinded while trying to fix the nurses' furnace, and Frank finds a sure-fire way to win bets on baseball games.
Lt Radar O'Riley: Following an offer of promotion made by Master Sergeant Woodruff at a poker game, Radar is promoted to the rank of lieutenant.
